small.name: Typical Startup Lab Suite
small.notes: Incubator or small pharma; shared core equipment; 4-6 lab bays; write-up space

medium.name: Broad Institute (75 Ames Street)
medium.notes: Genomics research; BSL-2 labs; computational space; open collaboration

large.name: NIH Building 10 (Clinical Center)
large.notes: Largest clinical research hospital; BSL-3/4; imaging; vivarium; clinical trials

space_library.name: Lab Module / Open Lab Bays
notes: Bench + equipment; high ventilation drives MEP

space_library.name: Lab Support Rooms (shared)
notes: Glasswash, cold rooms, write-up, storage, etc. Split in v0.2

space_library.name: Main Mechanical
notes: Exhaust, AHUs, heat recovery; often major building volume

plan_archetypes.notes: Finger-plan for lab/office adjacency; bar for smaller facilities
